channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 10, 2026
item.description: Hello, and welcome to The VENCAst, your daily dose of what's happening around the globe and right here in Central Europe. I'm your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, here to catch you up on the news for today, March 9th, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — March 09, 2026
item.description: Imagine a world where the Middle East conflict takes a dramatic turn with a new hardline leader, sending oil prices soaring and disrupting global shipping. Picture Europe becoming the world's largest arms importer, and right here in Central Europe, a...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 08, 2026
item.description: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, wherever and whenever you’re tuning in! I’m your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and this is The VENCAst, your daily download of what's shaping our world. Today is March 8th, 2026, and we've got a ...
